Reviews Contact

Precision Detailing for Savannah's Autos

Protect your vehicle from coastal salt air and relentless humidity. We treat every detail like it’s our own.

Call Now: 555-aut-r91

Get a FREE Estimate Today!

Savannah’s Trusted Auto Care Specialists

Founded in 2012, Summit Auto Detailing began with a single goal: to combat Savannah’s harsh coastal elements with meticulous paint corrections and interior shield treatments. Our team grew from a two-car garage near Starland District to a 20-person crew serving all of Chatham County.

Learn More About Us
Since 2014 Established
Locally Owned
Licensed & Insured

Our Auto Detailing Services

Professional auto detailing solutions tailored to your needs.

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our auto detailing services.

How does this differ from wax in our humid climate?

Traditional wax melts above 90°F and washes away in summer storms. Our ceramic coating withstands 160°F and bonds permanently, making it ideal for parked cars along River Street’s heat-radiating pavement.

Will this prevent rust on older vehicles?

While not a rustproofing solution, the coating drastically slows oxidation by denying salt moisture direct metal contact. We recommend undercarriage treatments for pre-2000 models kept near marshlands.

Reviews From Our Auto Detailing Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"After 3 years parked near the docks, my F-150’s hood was covered in salt pits. Summit removed every trace and applied their ceramic coating. Six months later, even after tropical storm flooding, water still beads like it’s fresh from the factory. Worth every penny for coastal owners."

Eleanor R. Salt Air Protection Coating

"The team saved my ‘72 Corvette’s original Mille Miglia Red paint after years under moss-draped oaks. They found a hidden dent near the fuel cap and corrected it without repainting—just like I asked. Now it looks showroom-fresh at Cars on Broughton events."

Marcus T. Vintage Paint Revitalization

"Our minivan smelled like a wet dog after the kids tracked in marsh mud all winter. Summit pulled up the seats and found mold growing under the padding. Their antimicrobial treatment eliminated the smell completely, and they even Scotchgarded the booster seats. Lifesavers!"

Lila & James W. Mold-Resistant Interior Detailing
